prompt: Apply a polished chrome finish to the main metal components of the CAD model to enhance their reflective properties.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Apply a polished chrome finish to the main metal components of the CAD model, including the suspension arms, shock absorbers, differential casing, and drive shafts, to enhance their reflective properties.
objects: CAD model of a vehicle rear assembly
suspension arms with polished chrome finish
